description: Installs and verifies the Winget package manager.

messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: Winget installation is disabled in config.
messages.wingetDisabled: Winget is disabled in config -- skipping
messages.wingetNotFoundSkip: Winget not found and installIfMissing is false -- skipping
messages.wingetNotInPath: Winget install completed but winget.exe not found in PATH
messages.wingetManualStore: Try installing manually from the Microsoft Store
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
